name: handoff
summary: Deterministic spine of the session handoff. save() GUARANTEES the handoff is written to record/handoffs/handoff-<date>.md (append-only, tracked-markdown history) and rendered to docs/RESUME-HERE.md (the always-current 'read this first'). The save location is computed in code (handoffsDir/resumePath from REPO_ROOT), never a free-form argument — a handoff cannot be written anywhere else. SECTIONS + missingSections/isComplete make completeness a check, mirroring incident.

admission.note: Candidate. NOT in harness/manifest.json and NOT admitted. Promotion is a human step.

input.description: A handoff body (the seven sections as markdown) plus metadata: date, session, gitHead. The command generates the body; the component saves it.

exit: check exits non-zero if any handoff is incomplete (missing one of the seven sections) — gate-ready, mirrors incident.
invariants: Every handoff is saved to record/handoffs/handoff-<date>.md — the append-only, tracked-markdown history (never at repo root, never elsewhere).
The latest handoff is always rendered to docs/RESUME-HERE.md (overwrite; always the same path).
The save location is computed in code (handoffsDir/resumePath), not a caller argument — it cannot be redirected.
A handoff is complete only when all seven sections are present (isComplete / missingSections).
The dated history is append-style: a new dated file per handoff; RESUME-HERE.md is the overwrite render.
Deterministic: identical body + metadata yields identical files (no clocks beyond the supplied date).
